sequence: Not provided in the source document
mechanism_of_action: Its action is thought to be due to a peptidase that cleaves cell wall polyglycine bridges and is found almost exclusively in coagulase-positive staphylococci.

toxicity_profile.cytotoxicity: No local or systemic reactions were detected in those treated either once or twice with intranasal lysostaphin. A single immediate wheal and flair skin test reaction was observed in one person.
